rulings.Case Title: PAUL A. VANDER WAERDT VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Entry Of Default Memorandum In Support Declaration Of Jennifer Wood Declaration Of Jonathan Varnica
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 28, 2020, line 1. Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Entry Of Default Memorandum In Support Declaration Of Jennifer Wood Declaration Of Jonathan Varnica is GRANTED. Answers to be filed forthwith. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AMANDA LYONS ET AL VS. CHOI LING KWAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Nelson Kwans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Amanda Lyons And Dustin Lyons Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 28, 2020, line 2. Defendant Nelson Kwans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Amanda Lyons And Dustin Lyons Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations. =(501/CFH)
